phrases.intent_en: Where is the execution site memorial wall?
phrases.text_local: Kde je pamětní zeď u popraviště?
phrases.cultural_note: At Czech memorial sites, staff often use natural landmarks like trees or stones for directions.

likely_response.local: Rovně po pěšině, u velkého kamene.
likely_response.translation_en: Straight along the path, by the big stone.

responses.english: Straight along the path, by the big stone.
responses.local: Rovně po pěšině, u velkého kamene.

phrases.intent_en: Where should I leave a donation?
phrases.cultural_note: Donation boxes at memorials are often placed discreetly and may be identified by a state symbol rather than a sign.

likely_response.local: Do kasičky u hlavního památníku, vedle vlajky.
likely_response.translation_en: Into the box at the main memorial, next to the flag.

responses.english: Into the box at the main memorial, next to the flag.
responses.local: Do kasičky u hlavního památníku, vedle vlajky.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I pay for parking?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking machines at remote Czech sites are often standalone units, not gated entry systems.

likely_response.local: U automatu na kraji lesního parkoviště.
likely_response.translation_en: At the machine at the edge of the forest lot.

responses.english: At the machine at the edge of the forest lot.
responses.local: U automatu na kraji lesního parkoviště.

phrases.intent_en: Is the Ležáky memorial section open now?
phrases.cultural_note: Many outdoor memorial areas in Czechia are unfenced and accessible outside formal opening hours.

likely_response.local: Ano, je volně přístupný po celý den.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is freely accessible all day.

responses.english: Yes, it is freely accessible all day.
responses.local: Ano, je volně přístupný po celý den.

phrases.intent_en: How do I book a guided tour here?
phrases.text_local: Jak si mohu rezervovat prohlídku s průvodcem?
phrases.cultural_note: Smaller memorial sites often use a simple sign-up sheet rather than a formal booking system.

likely_response.local: Stačí se zapsat u správce v dřevěné boudě.
likely_response.translation_en: Just sign up with the caretaker in the wooden shed.

responses.english: Just sign up with the caretaker in the wooden shed.
responses.local: Stačí se zapsat u správce v dřevěné boudě.
